---
description: Record and state field catalog for Conductor services. Use when adding or changing canonical records, service state, view models, or command targets.
applyTo: 'src/cs/workbench/services/**,src/cs/workbench/contrib/**,src/cs/platform/files/**'
---
# Records and State Field Catalog

A `Record` is a stable business fact that can be stored in or reconstructed from the session. A `State` is owned by a service or view-service and describes current behavior or UI/service condition. A `Model` is a derived projection used for rendering or execution.

Do not stop at class/type names. Every record must document fields, owner, producer, consumer, and invalidation rules.

## Record checklist

Every new record type must answer these questions:

| Question | Required answer |
| --- | --- |
| Owner | Which service owns mutation? |
| Producer | Which workflow creates it? |
| Consumers | Which services/views read it? |
| Canonical? | Is it stored in `SessionModel`, service state, or derived only? |
| Invalidation | Which input version/signature invalidates it? |
| Source reference | Does it point back to `RawTableRangeRef`, `MeasurementBlockId`, `CurveKey`, or `MetricKey`? |

## File and raw table records

### `FileImportResult`

Owner: `fileConverter.ts` / files import-export workflow produces it; `ISessionService` commits it. Canonical after commit as `FileRecord.raw`.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Required | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `readonly ImportedFileRecord[]` | Imported workbook/file records ready for session commit. | Yes | One Excel workbook should produce one imported file record. |
| `diagnostics` | `readonly FileImportDiagnostic[]` | Non-fatal import warnings/errors. | Yes | Do not encode IV/CV assessment here. |
| `createdAt` | `number` | Import result timestamp. | Yes | Useful for debugging only; not a semantic version. |

### `ImportedFileRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Required | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `FileId` | Stable id for this imported file/workbook. | Yes | Generated by import controller/service. |
| `name` | `string` | Display file name. | Yes | Does not have to be a filesystem basename for clipboard/manual data. |
| `kind` | `FileKind` | `csv`, `excel`, `clipboard`, `manual`, or `unknown`. | Yes | Source category, not measurement family. |
| `raw` | `RawRecord` | Raw file facts and raw tables. | Yes | No assessment/block/curve fields here. |

### `RawRecord`

Owner: committed inside `FileRecord`. Mutated only by `SessionService` when importing/replacing file raw data.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Required | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file id. | Yes | Must match `FileRecord.id`. |
| `fileName` | `string` | Original or display file name. | Yes | Used by Explorer and diagnostics. |
| `rawFile` | `unknown` | Optional browser `File` or opaque source object. | No | Do not rely on it for canonical computation if rows are externalized. |
| `size` | `number` | Source file size in bytes. | No | File fact only. |
| `lastModified` | `number` | Source file modified timestamp. | No | File fact only. |
| `relativePath` | `string | null` | Folder import relative path. | No | Explorer grouping input. |
| `filePath` | `string | null` | Native path when available. | No | Must not be required in browser-only paths. |
| `rawTablesById` | `Record<RawTableId, RawTableRecord>` | Raw tables produced from this file. | Yes | Excel: one table per sheet. CSV: usually one table. |
| `rawTableOrder` | `readonly RawTableId[]` | Stable display/processing order. | Yes | Preserve workbook sheet order. |

### `RawTableRecord`

Owner: `SessionService` after file import. Producer: `fileConverter.ts` / files import-export workflow. Consumers: `AssessmentService`, `TableService`, `SearchService`, export/debug tools.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Required | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file id. | Yes | Required for provenance. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Table/sheet id within the file. | Yes | Use this instead of `sheetId` in new code. |
| `source` | `RawTableSourceRecord` | Where this table came from. | Yes | Does not describe IV/CV semantics. |
| `rows` | `RawTableRowsRecord` | Where row values are stored. | Yes | Inline or normalized CSV. |
| `rowCount` | `number` | Number of physical rows. | Yes | Raw table size, not block data row count. |
| `columnCount` | `number` | Number of physical columns. | Yes | Raw table size. |
| `maxCellLengths` | `readonly number[]` | Estimated max display length per column. | No | Table column width hint only. |

### `RawTableSourceRecord`

| Variant | Fields | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `csv` | `kind: 'csv'`, optional `originalPath` | A CSV-like source. |
| `excelSheet` | `kind: 'excelSheet'`, `sheetIndex`, optional `sheetName`, optional `originalPath` | One workbook sheet normalized into one raw table. |
| `clipboard` | `kind: 'clipboard'`, `pastedAt`, optional `label` | Pasted tabular data. |
| `manual` | `kind: 'manual'`, optional `label` | User-created table. |
| `unknown` | `kind: 'unknown'` | Fallback only. |

### `RawTableRowsRecord`

| Variant | Fields | Meaning | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `inline` | `kind`, `values` | Rows are stored directly in memory/session. | Good for small files and tests. |
| `normalizedCsv` | `kind`, `normalizedCsvPath`, `formatVersion` | Rows live in an internal normalized CSV artifact. | Required for large Excel/multi-sheet workflow. |

### `RangeRef` and `RawTableRangeRef`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `startRow` | `number` | Zero-based inclusive row start. |
| `endRow` | `number` | Zero-based inclusive row end. |
| `startCol` | `number` | Zero-based inclusive column start. |
| `endCol` | `number` | Zero-based inclusive column end. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | File containing the raw table. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Raw table containing the range. |
| `range` | `RangeRef` | Physical cell rectangle. |

Use `RawTableRangeRef` for every object that points back to raw data: blocks, groups, columns, diagnostics, search results, parameters, and export provenance.

## Assessment records

### `RawTableAssessmentRecord`

Owner: `AssessmentService` produces; `SessionService` commits. Canonical after commit.

| Field | Type | Meaning | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | File containing assessed table. | Yes |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Assessed raw table. | Yes |
| `sourceRawTableVersion` | `number` | Raw table version used to produce this result. | Yes |
| `groups` | `readonly MeasurementGroupRecord[]` | Device/sample groups found in the raw table. | Yes |
| `blocks` | `readonly MeasurementBlockRecord[]` | Measurement blocks found in the raw table. | Yes |
| `diagnostics` | `readonly AssessmentDiagnostic[]` | Warnings/errors/info generated during assessment. | Yes |
| `createdAt` | `number` | Assessment timestamp. | Yes |

### `MeasurementGroupRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `MeasurementGroupId` | Stable group id. | Unique within file/session. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. | Required for flattened indexes. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Parent raw table. | Required. |
| `label` | `string` | Device/sample label, for example `1-HS`. | May be inferred from title cell. |
| `titleRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Source cell/range for label. | Optional. |
| `blockIds` | `readonly MeasurementBlockId[]` | Blocks belonging to this group. | Order matters. |
| `confidence` | `AssessmentConfidence | undefined` | Confidence for group detection. | Optional. |

### `MeasurementBlockRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `MeasurementBlockId` | Stable block id. | Should survive re-assessment when source range is stable. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. | Required. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Parent raw table. | Required. |
| `groupId` | `MeasurementGroupId | undefined` | Optional device/sample group. | Blocks can exist without group. |
| `label` | `string | undefined` | Human-readable label. | Usually inherited from group/title. |
| `family` | `MeasurementFamily` | `iv`, `cv`, `cf`, `pv`, `it`, or `unknown`. | Do not encode transfer/output here. |
| `ivMode` | `IvCurveMode | null | undefined` | `transfer` or `output` for IV blocks. | Only valid when `family === 'iv'`. |
| `itMode` | `ItCurveMode | null | undefined` | Stability/transient/etc. for IT blocks. | Only valid when `family === 'it'`. |
| `source` | `RawBlockSourceRef` | Full/header/data/title ranges. | Required. |
| `columns` | `MeasurementColumnMap` | Semantic mapping of raw columns. | Required. |
| `rowCount` | `number` | Data row count excluding header/title. | Required. |
| `columnCount` | `number` | Physical block column count. | Required. |
| `confidence` | `AssessmentConfidence | undefined` | Family/block confidence. | Optional. |
| `diagnosticCodes` | `readonly AssessmentDiagnosticCode[]` | Related diagnostics. | Optional. |

### `RawBlockSourceRef`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `fullRange` | `RawTableRangeRef` | Whole block rectangle. |
| `headerRange` | `RawTableRangeRef` | Header cells. |
| `dataRange` | `RawTableRangeRef` | Data body only. |
| `titleRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Optional title/device label cells. |

### `MeasurementColumnRef`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rawCol` | `number` | Absolute column index in the raw table. |
| `headerText` | `string` | Original header cell text. |
| `role` | `MeasurementColumnRole` | `index`, `vd`, `vg`, `id`, `ig`, `capacitance`, etc. |
| `unit` | `string | undefined` | Parsed unit, for example `V`, `A`, `F`. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Header cell/range provenance. |
| `confidence` | `AssessmentConfidence | undefined` | Column-role confidence. |

### `MeasurementColumnMap`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `index` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Index column. |
| `vd` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Drain voltage column. |
| `vg` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Gate voltage column. |
| `id` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Drain current column. |
| `ig` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Gate current column. |
| `capacitance` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Capacitance column. |
| `frequency` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Frequency column. |
| `time` | `MeasurementColumnRef | undefined` | Time column. |
| `extra` | `readonly MeasurementColumnRef[]` | Columns that are present but not mapped to known roles. |

### `AssessmentDiagnostic`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `severity` | `'info' | 'warning' | 'error'` | Diagnostic severity. |
| `code` | `AssessmentDiagnosticCode` | Stable machine-readable code. |
| `message` | `string` | Human-readable message. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Location if known. |
| `relatedBlockId` | `MeasurementBlockId | undefined` | Related block. |
| `relatedGroupId` | `MeasurementGroupId | undefined` | Related group. |

## Session records

### `SessionModel`

Owner: `SessionService` only. Canonical root.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `schemaVersion` | `1` | Shape version for migration. |
| `sessionVersion` | `number` | Increments on canonical data change. |
| `filesById` | `Record<FileId, FileRecord>` | Imported file lifecycle records. |
| `fileOrder` | `readonly FileId[]` | Stable display/processing order. |

### `FileRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning | Owner of mutation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `FileId` | File id. | Session |
| `name` | `string` | Display name. | Session/import commit |
| `kind` | `FileKind` | Source kind. | Session/import commit |
| `raw` | `RawRecord` | Raw tables and file facts. | Session/import commit |
| `rawTableVersionsById` | `Record<RawTableId, number>` | Version per raw table. | Session |
| `assessmentsByRawTableId` | `Record<RawTableId, RawTableAssessmentRecord>` | Latest assessment per raw table. | Session commit assessment |
| `measurementBlocksById` | `Record<MeasurementBlockId, MeasurementBlockRecord>` | Flattened blocks for quick lookup. | Session commit assessment |
| `measurementBlockOrder` | `readonly MeasurementBlockId[]` | Stable block order. | Session commit assessment |
| `templateRunsById` | `Record<TemplateRunId, TemplateRunRecord> | undefined` | Template execution history. | Session commit template |
| `latestTemplateRunId` | `TemplateRunId | null | undefined` | Current template run. | Session commit template |
| `seriesById` | `Record<SeriesId, SeriesRecord>` | Series produced from template/assessment. | Session commit template/curves |
| `seriesOrder` | `readonly SeriesId[]` | Series order for plot/export. | Session commit template/curves |
| `curvesByKey` | `Record<CurveKey, CurveRecord>` | Base/derived/second-derived curves. | Session commit curves/calculation |
| `metricsByKey` | `Record<MetricKey, MetricRecord>` | Computed parameter metrics. | Session commit metrics |
| `metricsBySeriesId` | `Record<SeriesId, readonly MetricKey[]> | undefined` | Metric lookup by series. | Session commit metrics |
| `metricInputsByKey` | `Record<MetricKey, MetricInputRecord> | undefined` | User/manual inputs that affect metric computation. | Session |
| `calculationCache` | `CalculationCacheRecord | undefined` | Rebuildable calculation cache. | Calculation/session |

### `SeriesRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId | undefined` | Source raw table if known. |
| `measurementBlockId` | `MeasurementBlockId | undefined` | Source block if known. |
| `id` | `SeriesId` | Stable series id. |
| `name` | `string | undefined` | Display name. |
| `legendValue` | `string | number | undefined` | Sweep/group legend value. |
| `groupIndex` | `number` | Group index in display order. |
| `xCol` | `number | undefined` | Source x column index. |
| `yCol` | `number | undefined` | Source y column index. |
| `labelOverride` | `string | undefined` | User override. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Provenance range. |

### `CurveRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. |
| `seriesId` | `SeriesId` | Source series. |
| `curveGeneration` | `'base' | 'derived' | 'secondDerived'` | Generation layer. |
| `curveFamily` | `BaseCurveFamily | DerivedCurveFamily | SecondDerivedCurveFamily` | Family kind. |
| `ivMode` | `IvCurveMode | null | undefined` | IV transfer/output for base IV curves. |
| `itMode` | `ItCurveMode | null | undefined` | IT mode for base IT curves. |
| `lineage` | `CurveLineage` | Source curve/series provenance. |
| `points` | `readonly CurvePoint[]` | Numeric plot points. |
| `channels` | `CurveChannelsRecord | undefined` | Derived numeric channels such as abs/log positive. |
| `domain` | `DomainRecord | undefined` | Precomputed numeric domains. |
| `signature` | `string` | Invalidation signature. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Raw source provenance for base curves. |

### `MetricRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `key` | `MetricKey` | Stable metric id. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. |
| `seriesId` | `SeriesId` | Target series. |
| `metricFamily` | `'current' | 'derivative' | 'threshold' | 'subthreshold'` | Metric family. |
| `contextKey` | `string` | Config/context discriminator. |
| `inputCurves` | `readonly CurveRef[]` | Curves used as input. |
| `inputSignatures` | `readonly string[]` | Signatures used for invalidation. |
| `algorithm` | `{ id: string; version?: string } | undefined` | Algorithm provenance. |
| `value` | `unknown` | Family-specific value record. |

## Template records

### `TemplateRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Template id. |
| `name` | `string` | Display name. |
| `config` | `TemplateConfig` | Template configuration. |
| `createdAt` | `number | undefined` | Creation time. |
| `updatedAt` | `number | undefined` | Last update time. |
| `source` | `'builtIn' | 'user' | 'imported' | undefined` | Template origin. |

### `TemplateConfig`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `xDataStart` | `number` | First x data row offset or absolute row depending on mode. |
| `xDataEnd` | `number` | Last x data row. |
| `xSegmentationMode` | `'auto' | 'points' | 'segments'` | How x/y groups are segmented. |
| `xSegmentCount` | `number | undefined` | Number of x segments. |
| `xPointsPerGroup` | `number | undefined` | Points per group. |
| `xUnit` | `string | undefined` | X unit. |
| `yLegendStart` | `number | undefined` | Starting legend value. |
| `yLegendCount` | `number | undefined` | Legend count. |
| `yLegendStep` | `number | undefined` | Legend step. |
| `yLegendTarget` | `'auto' | 'yColumn' | 'group'` | Where legend values come from. |
| `yUnit` | `string | undefined` | Y unit. |
| `bottomTitle` | `string | undefined` | X axis title override. |
| `leftTitle` | `string | undefined` | Y axis title override. |
| `legendPrefix` | `string | undefined` | Legend prefix. |
| `yColumns` | `readonly number[]` | Y columns to extract. |
| `stopOnError` | `boolean` | Whether to stop on extraction error. |

### `TemplateRunRecord`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `TemplateRunId` | Run id. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Target file. |
| `selection` | `TemplateSelectionRecord` | Auto/manual/template selection used. |
| `config` | `TemplateConfig` | Effective config. |
| `input` | `TemplateInputRecord | undefined` | Source ranges/blocks used. |
| `sourceBlockIds` | `readonly MeasurementBlockId[]` | Blocks used by this run. |
| `outputSeriesIds` | `readonly SeriesId[]` | Series produced. |
| `outputCurveKeys` | `readonly CurveKey[]` | Curves produced. |
| `configFingerprint` | `string` | Stable config signature. |
| `mode` | `'auto' | 'manual' | 'rule'` | Application mode. |
| `appliedAt` | `number` | Timestamp. |
| `warnings` | `readonly string[]` | Non-fatal warnings. |
| `errors` | `readonly string[]` | Fatal or per-file errors. |

## Plot records and state

### `PlotState`

Owner: `PlotService`. Service state, not session canonical data.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `activePlotType` | `PlotType` | Current plot family shown. |
| `activeFileId` | `FileId | null` | File currently plotted. |
| `visibleCurveKeys` | `readonly CurveKey[] | undefined` | Explicit visible curves; absent means default visibility. |
| `hiddenCurveKeys` | `readonly CurveKey[] | undefined` | Curves hidden by user. |
| `focusedCurveKey` | `CurveKey | null` | Keyboard/legend focus. |
| `hoveredCurveKey` | `CurveKey | null` | Pointer hover. |
| `xUnitByFileId` | `Record<FileId, string>` | X display unit overrides. |
| `yUnitByFileId` | `Record<FileId, string>` | Y display unit overrides. |
| `yScaleByFileId` | `Record<FileId, 'linear' | 'log'>` | Y scale overrides. |
| `axisTitleOverridesByKey` | `Record<string, string>` | User axis-title overrides. |

### `PlotRenderModel`

Derived model. Producer: `PlotService`. Consumers: Chart, Thumbnail, Search, Export.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `modelId` | `string` | Stable id for this render model instance/signature. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Source file. |
| `plotType` | `PlotType` | Rendered plot type. |
| `seriesList` | `readonly PlotSeriesModel[]` | Display-ready series. |
| `axis` | `PlotAxisModel` | Axis labels, units, domains, scales, ticks. |
| `pointsCount` | `number` | Total rendered point count. |
| `sourceCurveKeys` | `readonly CurveKey[]` | Curves used to build the model. |
| `signature` | `string` | Invalidation signature. |
| `diagnostics` | `readonly PlotDiagnostic[]` | Plot-specific warnings. |

### `PlotSeriesModel`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `seriesId` | `SeriesId` | Source series id. |
| `curveKey` | `CurveKey` | Source curve key. |
| `label` | `string` | Display label. |
| `points` | `readonly PlotPoint[]` | Display points after unit conversion/filtering/downsampling. |
| `rawPointCount` | `number` | Original point count before downsampling. |
| `visible` | `boolean` | Effective visibility. |
| `focused` | `boolean` | Focus state. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Provenance for linking back to table/search. |

### `PlotAxisModel`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `xLabel` | `string` | Effective x label. |
| `yLabel` | `string` | Effective y label. |
| `xUnitLabel` | `string` | Effective x unit label. |
| `yUnitLabel` | `string` | Effective y unit label. |
| `xFactor` | `number` | Unit conversion factor for x. |
| `yFactor` | `number` | Unit conversion factor for y. |
| `xDomain` | `[number, number]` | Display x domain. |
| `yDomain` | `[number, number]` | Display y domain. |
| `yScale` | `'linear' | 'log'` | Effective y scale. |
| `xTicks` | `readonly number[] | undefined` | Optional computed x ticks. |
| `yTicks` | `readonly number[] | undefined` | Optional computed y ticks. |

## Chart state

### `ChartState`

Owner: `ChartService`. Service/view-shell state only.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `visibleDetailPanes` | `readonly ChartDetailPane[]` | Open chart detail panes, for example inspector. |
| `legendPopoverOpen` | `boolean` | Legend popover visibility. |
| `inspectorVisible` | `boolean` | Inspector visibility. |
| `headerVisible` | `boolean` | Header/action visibility. |
| `lastRenderedPlotModelId` | `string | null` | Last plot model rendered by Chart. |

## Table state

### `TableState`

Owner: `TableService`. Not session canonical data.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | `TableSource | null` | Current raw table/block source. |
| `fileName` | `string` | Display source file name. |
| `rawTableName` | `string | undefined` | Sheet/table display name. |
| `rowCount` | `number` | Current source row count. |
| `columnCount` | `number` | Current source column count. |
| `loadState` | `TableLoadState` | Idle/loading/ready/error state. |
| `selection` | `TableSelection` | Active cell/ranges. |
| `highlight` | `TableHighlight` | Temporary ranges/columns highlighted by search/assessment. |
| `revealCell` | `TableCell | null` | Cell requested for scroll/reveal. |
| `rowsVersion` | `number` | Increments when visible row cache changes. |

### `TableSource`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `'rawTable' | 'measurementBlock' | 'range'` | Source category. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | File id. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId` | Raw table id. |
| `measurementBlockId` | `MeasurementBlockId | undefined` | Block source if applicable. |
| `range` | `RangeRef | undefined` | Explicit range if applicable. |

## Explorer state

### `ExplorerState`

Owner: `ExplorerService`. Service state for left-side Explorer, not file import and not filesystem.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `layout` | `'tree' | 'thumbnail'` | Explorer display mode. |
| `selectedFileId` | `FileId | null` | Selected file in Explorer. |
| `expandedFolderKeys` | `readonly string[]` | Expanded folder nodes. |
| `folderOrder` | `readonly string[]` | Optional user-created/imported folder order. |
| `importState` | `ExplorerImportState` | Current import workflow status. |
| `error` | `string | null` | Last user-visible import/explorer error. |
| `dragging` | `boolean` | Whether drag-over state is active. |

### `ExplorerResource`

Derived from session and explorer grouping state.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `'folder' | 'file' | 'rawTable' | 'measurementBlock'` | Resource kind shown in Explorer. |
| `key` | `string` | Stable tree key. |
| `fileId` | `FileId | undefined` | File id for file/table/block resources. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId | undefined` | Raw table id for table/block resources. |
| `measurementBlockId` | `MeasurementBlockId | undefined` | Block id for block resources. |
| `name` | `string` | Display name. |
| `parentKey` | `string | undefined` | Parent folder/tree key. |
| `children` | `readonly ExplorerResource[] | undefined` | Child resources. |
| `diagnosticBadge` | `string | undefined` | Optional assessment/import badge. |
| `thumbnailModelId` | `string | undefined` | Optional thumbnail reference. |

## Search records

### `SearchResult`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Stable result id for the query. |
| `kind` | `SearchResultKind` | Raw cell, group, block, column, curve, metric, etc. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | File id. |
| `rawTableId` | `RawTableId | undefined` | Raw table id when applicable. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Source range for table reveal. |
| `title` | `string` | Primary display text. |
| `preview` | `string | undefined` | Secondary display text. |
| `score` | `number` | Ranking score. |
| `groupId` | `MeasurementGroupId | undefined` | Related group. |
| `measurementBlockId` | `MeasurementBlockId | undefined` | Related block. |
| `curveKey` | `CurveKey | undefined` | Related curve. |
| `metricKey` | `MetricKey | undefined` | Related metric. |

## Export records

### `ExportPlan`

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | Plan id/signature. |
| `scope` | `ExportScope` | Current/all/selected/filtered scope. |
| `format` | `ExportFormat` | Origin zip, CSV, image, etc. |
| `fileIds` | `readonly FileId[]` | Files included. |
| `curveKeysByFileId` | `Record<FileId, readonly CurveKey[]>` | Curves included per file. |
| `metricKeysByFileId` | `Record<FileId, readonly MetricKey[]>` | Metrics included per file. |
| `plotModelIds` | `readonly string[]` | Plot models used for image/chart export. |
| `payloads` | `readonly ExportPayload[]` | Concrete payloads to write/open. |
| `diagnostics` | `readonly ExportDiagnostic[]` | Export warnings/errors. |

## Parameters records/state

### `ParametersState`

Owner: `ParametersService`. UI/service state only.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `activeMetricKey` | `MetricKey | null` | Focused metric row. |
| `selectedMetricKeys` | `readonly MetricKey[]` | Selected parameter rows. |
| `ionIoffMethod` | `'auto' | 'manual'` | Display/input mode for Ion/Ioff. |
| `ssMethod` | `'auto' | 'manual'` | Display/input mode for SS. |
| `showFitLine` | `boolean` | Whether fit overlays are visible. |

### `ParameterRowModel`

Derived from `MetricRecord` and plot/session context.

| Field | Type | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `metricKey` | `MetricKey` | Source metric. |
| `fileId` | `FileId` | Parent file. |
| `seriesId` | `SeriesId` | Source series. |
| `label` | `string` | Row label. |
| `valueText` | `string` | Formatted value. |
| `unit` | `string | undefined` | Display unit. |
| `editable` | `boolean` | Whether manual input can edit this row. |
| `sourceRange` | `RawTableRangeRef | undefined` | Optional provenance. |
